nodes.context: A Jewish criminal organization founded in the 1860s, trafficking women from Central Europe into sexual slavery in Argentina and other countries.
A splinter group of Zwi Migdal led by Simon Rubinstein, established its own society and cemetery.
A term referring to Jewish organized crime groups, mentioned as an ally of Zwi Migdal.

edges.context: Ashkenazum was a splinter group that split from Zwi Migdal.
Zwi Migdal had allies in the Jewish Mob.
